texto: I think a great first date would be something different... not like movies or going to dinner... going rock climbing together... doing an activity and then going to dinner, so that you guys share an experience, and then you have something to talk about, and it's not the same old thing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Madeline Zima: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I think a great first date would be something different... not like movies or going to dinner... …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, experience, great pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de great e together.

texto: I grew up with a lot of people who are famous now. I was friends with Hilary and Haley Duff. They are such lovely girls. I have watched their careers blossom, which I am really happy for. I grew up with Ashley Tisdale; we used to both live in Valencia, so we used to hang out back in the day.

frase_original: I grew up with a lot of people who are famous now. I was friends with Hilary and Haley Duff. They are such lovely girls. I have watched their careers blossom, which I am really happy for. I grew up with Ashley Tisdale; we used to both live in Valencia, so we used to hang out back in the day.
